get.description:
Return canonical backend product-agent registry and supervisor health.

This is the single runtime introspection surface for backend product agents;
it intentionally exposes static in-repo registry contracts instead of
dynamic plugin metadata.
Return canonical backend product-agent events across trips.

post.description: Synchronously run one supervisor pass for testing/admin operations.

get.description: Return trips and metrics for a specific agent.
List pending operational alerts (Wave 10).

schema.title: Response Get Analytics Alerts Analytics Alerts Get

post.description: Dismiss an operational alert by flagging the source trip.

schema.title: Response Get Analytics Bottlenecks Analytics Bottlenecks Get

get.description: Return escalation heatmap data.

post.description: Export insights data. Returns a mock export URL for now.

get.description: Return conversion funnel metrics.

schema.title: Response Get Analytics Pipeline Analytics Pipeline Get

get.description: List all trips currently flagged for owner review.

post.description: Apply review actions in bulk.

get.description: Get a single review by trip ID.

schema.title: Response Get Analytics Team Analytics Team Get

get.description:
List audit log entries for the current agency.

Requires owner or admin role (audit:read permission).
Results are scoped to the requesting user's agency.

parameters.name: since

schema.description: ISO timestamp for filtering logs after this date
schema.title: Since

parameters.description: ISO timestamp for filtering logs after this date

post.description:
Create a new user account and join an existing agency via a workspace invitation code.

This is the agent onboarding path — distinct from /signup which creates a new agency.
On success, sets the same httpOnly auth cookies as /signup and /login.

Codes are multi-use (reusable invitation links). The owner revokes a code to prevent
further joins. Role defaults to junior_agent regardless of code_type; the owner
promotes agents to senior_agent after onboarding review.

Refresh the access token using the refresh_token cookie.

The refresh_token is read from the cookie jar (httpOnly, path=/api/auth).
Clients do NOT need to send it in the request body — the browser
automatically includes it because the path matches.

Create a new user, agency, and membership.
Sets httpOnly cookies for auth.

Test users: Email ending with '@test.com' will get mock data seeded,
but only in development. In production, @test.com signups are treated
as normal accounts with no test data.

get.description:
Validate a workspace invitation code without requiring authentication.

Used by the /join/[code] page to display the agency name before the user
commits to signing up. Returns 404 for any invalid/expired/revoked code
to avoid leaking information about code existence.

This endpoint is intentionally unauthenticated — it is listed under /api/auth/
which is a PUBLIC_PREFIX in the auth middleware, so no JWT is required.

Dashboard stat cards — computed entirely by the backend aggregator.
Scopes all metrics to the current user's agency.

post.description: Create a new draft. Auto-generates name if not provided.

get.description: List drafts for the current agency, optionally filtered by status.
Get a single draft by ID.

put.description: Full update of a draft. Requires version match for optimistic concurrency.

patch.description: Partial update of a draft. Same as PUT but semantic PATCH.

get.description: Get audit events for a draft.

post.description: Promote a draft to a trip. Marks draft as promoted and read-only.
Restore a discarded draft.

get.description: Get runs linked to this draft via run_snapshots.

Internal signed URL endpoint for document download.

Validates HMAC claim keyed by document_id. Returns file content.
Uses a plain session because auth is HMAC-based (not agency-scoped JWT),
and the document_id is validated by the signed URL before this endpoint runs.

post.description: Submit a public itinerary checker run without agency auth.

get.description: Customer loads form context. No auth required. Shows safe trip summary only.

post.description:
Customer uploads a document through a collection link token.

Token is NOT consumed — stays active for booking-data submit.
Customer submits booking data. No auth. Writes to pending_booking_data.

get.description: Return the complete agency configuration (profile + operational + autonomy).
Get approval threshold configuration.
Return the agency autonomy policy (gates, overrides, flags).

post.description:
Update the agency autonomy policy.

- Rejects any attempt to set STOP_NEEDS_REVIEW to anything other than block.
- Persists to the file-backed AgencySettingsStore.

Update agency operational and profile settings.
Only fields provided in the request are modified; others remain unchanged.

get.description: Get pipeline stage configuration.
Return typed integrity issues. Scoped to the current user's agency.
Return unified state. Scoped to the current user's agency.

post.description: Invite a new team member (creates User + Membership).

get.description: List all team members for the current agency.

schema.title: Response List Team Members Api Team Members Get

get.description: Get a single team member by membership ID.

patch.description: Update a team member's role, capacity, or specializations.

get.description: Get workload distribution across active team members.
Retrieve the unified timeline for a trip from AuditStore.

post.description: Generate a new workspace invitation code. Requires team:manage permission (owner/admin).

get.description: List assignments for trips in the current agency.
Get recent audit events for the current agency.

Get all trips with follow-up reminders.

Query params:
- status: pending|completed|snoozed
- filter: due_today|overdue|upcoming

Returns: List of trips with follow-up info sorted by due date

patch.description:
Reschedule a follow-up to a new date.

Body: {"new_date": "2026-05-15T14:00:00Z"}

Snooze a follow-up reminder.

Query params:
- days: 1, 3, or 7 (default: 1)

post.description: Log traveler emotional state scoped to the caller's agency.
Start a new autonomic Ghost Concierge workflow scoped to the caller's agency.

get.description: Retrieve a Ghost workflow — returns 404 if not found or not owned by caller's agency.

post.description:
Submit anonymized risk data to the federated intelligence pool.

The intelligence pool is cross-agency by design (source_agency_hash instead of
agency_id). The _agency_id dependency is retained to enforce authentication without
storing the caller's identity in the pooled record.

get.description:
Canonical inbox endpoint — service-level projected, filtered, sorted, paginated.

Returns a stable {items, total, hasMore, filterCounts} envelope.
filterCounts are computed over the FULL projected dataset so tab counts
are accurate regardless of active filter or page size.

post.description:
Assign inbox trips to an agent.

Sets assigned_to_id and moves each trip from inbox to workspace (status=assigned).
Apply bulk actions to inbox items.

get.description: Return aggregate inbox statistics for Overview cards.
Get a specific override by ID.

schema.title: Response Get Override Overrides  Override Id  Get

post.description:
Submit a spine run and return immediately.

This is the canonical Process Trip path. Poll GET /runs/{run_id} for
status, checkpointed steps, events, and final trip_id.

get.description:
List run records, newest first.
Optionally filter by trip_id and/or state (queued|running|completed|failed|blocked).

Full run status including metadata and latest checkpointed steps.
Returns 404 if the run_id is not found in the ledger.

Return the append-only event log for a run in chronological order.
Returns empty list if the run_id is unknown (no events written yet).

Return the full checkpointed output for a single pipeline step.
Returns 404 if the step has not been checkpointed yet.

List trips for the current user's agency, optionally filtered by status.

Test agencies (is_test=True) will automatically get mock data seeded
if no trips exist yet.
Get a specific trip by ID.

patch.description:
Update trip fields (e.g. status, follow_up_due_date).

Supported fields:
- status: Trip status (new, in_progress, completed, etc.)
- follow_up_due_date: ISO-8601 datetime string for promised follow-up

get.description: Retrieve activity provenance for a trip.
Return product-agent observability events for a single trip.

post.description: Assign a trip to an agent.

get.description: Lazy-load booking data for a trip. Not included in generic GET /trips.

patch.description:
Update booking data with stage gate, optimistic lock, audit, readiness recompute.

Booking data and readiness are written in a single atomic update_trip_if_version
call to prevent partial updates (booking data written but readiness stale).

Update payment tracking only. Preserves travelers/payer/notes unchanged.

Read-merge-write: fetches current booking data, replaces only payment_tracking,
writes back atomically with the same trip-level optimistic lock.

post.description:
Generate a customer collection link for this trip.

Creates a token that can be shared with the customer to collect booking data.
The token is single-use and expires after the configured TTL.
Returns the token ID, collection URL, and expiration time.

get.description: Check collection link status and pending submission.

post.description: Agent uploads a document for a trip.

get.description: List all non-deleted documents for a trip.

delete.description: Soft-delete a document. Only allowed from accepted/rejected status.

post.description: Accept a pending document. Only allowed from pending_review status.

get.description: Get a short-lived signed URL for downloading a document.

post.description: Run OCR extraction on a document. Allowed for pending_review or accepted documents.

get.description: Get extraction results for a document.

post.description: Apply selected extraction fields to booking_data. Requires document accepted.

get.description: List all extraction attempts for a document (audit trail). No PII.

schema.title: Response List Extraction Attempts Trips  Trip Id  Documents  Document Id  Extraction Attempts Get

post.description: Reject extraction results. Does not modify booking_data. Allowed at any stage.
Retry a failed extraction. Creates new run with attempt rows.
Reject a pending document. Only allowed from pending_review status.
Record an operator override of a risk flag for a trip.

get.description: List all overrides for a trip.

schema.title: Response List Overrides Trips  Trip Id  Overrides Get

get.description: View pending customer submission. Agent-only.

post.description:
Accept pending customer submission into trusted booking_data.

Computes readiness BEFORE writing, then persists booking_data, pending_booking_data,
booking_data_source, and validation (with readiness) in a single atomic
versioned update. This prevents the trip from being left with booking data
accepted but readiness stale if the second write fails.
Reject pending customer submission. Clears pending data.
Reassign a trip to a different agent.
Apply a review action (approve/reject/request_changes/escalate) to a trip.
Snooze a trip until a specified time.

get.description:
Get all suitability flags for a trip.

Returns suitability signals with confidence scores and tier information.
Tier 1 (critical/high): Hard blockers requiring operator acknowledgment
Tier 2 (medium/low): Warnings for operator review

post.description: Acknowledge suitability flags for a trip, allowing it to proceed.
Remove assignment from a trip.
